title: Soccer Day held at Lategansvlei
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Eden Football Academy (EFA) in partnership with the Greater Oudtshoorn Municipality, Jakaranda Catering & Events, Spekbos NPO and Alte Försterei, hosted the u.15 Nelson Mandela Youth Cup tournament on Saturday 20 July in Lategansvlei.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Eden Football Academy (EFA) in partnership with the Greater Oudtshoorn Municipality, Jakaranda Catering & Events, Spekbos NPO and Alte Försterei, hosted the u.15 Nelson Mandela Youth Cup tournament on Saturday 20 July in Lategansvlei."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Odn Tigers was the winners and Altetico was the runners-up. The tournament was to uphold the legacy of Nelson Mandela by edifying the youth about these historic times. EFA will endeavour to run this tournament annually within the surrounding communities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The teams that participated was: Atletico, Aqua/Rising Stars, Bongolethu Primary, Lategansvlei, Oudtshoorn Tigers and Unicorns FC.","html":"The teams that participated was: Atletico, Aqua/Rising Stars, Bongolethu Primary, Lategansvlei, Oudtshoorn Tigers and Unicorns FC."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Results:","html":"Results:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Group 1","html":"Group 1"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lategansvlei 1 vs Aqua/Rising Stars 1","html":"Lategansvlei 1 vs Aqua/Rising Stars 1"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Group 2","html":"Group 2"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Atletico 10 vs Unicorns 1","html":"Atletico 10 vs Unicorns 1"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Group 3","html":"Group 3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Unicorns 1 vs Odn Tigers 2","html":"Unicorns 1 vs Odn Tigers 2"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Group 4","html":"Group 4"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Atletico 1 vs Bongolethu 0","html":"Atletico 1 vs Bongolethu 0"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Group 5","html":"Group 5"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Aqua/Rising Stars 3 vs Odn Tigers 3","html":"Aqua/Rising Stars 3 vs Odn Tigers 3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Group 6","html":"Group 6"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Unicorns 1 vs Bongolethu 6","html":"Unicorns 1 vs Bongolethu 6"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The EFA thanked the Greater Oudtshoorn Municipality and Ian Laubscher for the sponsors, as well as Jakaranda Catering & Events, Spekbos, Luzette Reuter and friends, Sybil Schoombee and the EFA coaches/teams and officials on the day. They also thanked Dario Urbanski and his wife Carmen for being great hosts at the Alte Försterei Stadium-Lategansvlei.","html":"The EFA thanked the Greater Oudtshoorn Municipality and Ian Laubscher for the sponsors, as well as Jakaranda Catering & Events, Spekbos, Luzette Reuter and friends, Sybil Schoombee and the EFA coaches/teams and officials on the day. They also thanked Dario Urbanski and his wife Carmen for being great hosts at the Alte Försterei Stadium-Lategansvlei."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
